docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF BRIAN HEADEN FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEADEN, BRIAN C. (PROVIDE ACCESS)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-18-2026 CONTINUED TO MAY-20-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); FILE NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS. THE MAY-20-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2026 CONTINUED TO OCT-27-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); TO FILE NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CIVIL RIGHTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEADEN, BRIAN C. (PROVIDE ACCESS) AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, PRICILLA DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-18-2026
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEADEN, BRIAN C. (PROVIDE ACCESS)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF HEADEN, BRIAN C. (PROVIDE ACCESS)
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF HEADEN, BRIAN C. (PROVIDE ACCESS)
